summary: Completed comprehensive testing of SoundForge audio restructuring application. Backend APIs are fully functional (10/10 tests passed). Frontend UI and integration testing shows excellent functionality with only minor export dialog overlay issue.

ui_bugs.issue: Export button click blocked by Emergent badge overlay element
ui_bugs.workaround: Use force=True in click or adjust z-index of overlay

passed_tests: Backend: All 10 API endpoints working (root, list tracks, upload, get track, analyze, restructure, list projects, get project, export, serve audio)
Frontend: App loads with dark theme and SoundForge header
Frontend: Upload zone visible and clickable
Frontend: Track list shows tracks with analyzed badges
Frontend: Track selection displays waveform visualization
Frontend: Analyze Structure button detects 5 sections with colored blocks
Frontend: Section editor shows draggable colored blocks with timing
Frontend: Restructure and Collage tabs functional
Frontend: Apply Restructure creates projects successfully
Frontend: Waveform shows colored sections after analysis
Frontend: Projects created and listed in sidebar
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix export dialog overlay issue - Emergent badge is blocking export button clicks. Adjust z-index or positioning of overlay elements.
